'''Tar Morden''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Tar Morden" /> located in the [[Tar Morden system/Legends|Tar Morden system]], within the [[Vensensor sector/Legends|Vensensor sector]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]],<ref name="EAOC" /> along the [[Corellian Trade Spine/Legends|Corellian Trade Spine]].<ref name="TEA" /> It was the site of a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent System]] facility that manufactured [[LM-432 crab droid/Legends|LM-432 crab droids]].<ref name="Tar Morden" /> These [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]] [[Factory/Legends|factories]] were taken by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Battle of Tar Morden]] at the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]],<ref name="CRA 1-2">{{FactFile2014|27|CRA 1-2|LM-432 Crab Droid}}</ref> and tens of thousands of [[Crab/Legends|crab]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]] were captured. These droids were eventually used in live-fire [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] training exercises<ref name="TNEGtD">''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref> at the [[Carida Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]] on the planet [[Carida/Legends|Carida]].<ref name="CRA 1-2" />

Shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] established a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] manufacturing enterprise on Tar Morden.<ref name="Tar Morden" /> Information about this enterprise was gathered by [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]], which sent it in a [[Tech 4 PDV|Plexus Droid Vessel]] to the Vensensor [[Sector/Legends|sector's]] [[Imperial Intelligence Sector HQ]]. Rebels intercepted this vessel, which self destructed, ejecting its [[I2-CG droid/Legends|I2-CG]] [[storage and transceiving droid]], which landed on [[Goratak III]].<ref name="MB">{{WEGCite|story=The Crystal Forest of Goratak|book=Star Wars Miniatures Battles (first edition)|reprint=1}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Expansion Region map in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' refers to the system as "'''Tar Mordren'''," though the appendix of the book uses the existing spelling.
